require.owen-it/laravel-auditing: Required if using the default model template with audit support
require.wildside/userstamps: Required if using the default model template with userstamp support
require.darkaonline/l5-swagger: For automatic Swagger documentation regeneration after scaffolding
require.inertiajs/inertia-laravel: Required if using the HandleInertiaRequests stub with SharesPermissions trait
require.laravel/scout: Required if using the search.models config to add Searchable trait to models
